remarks: Welcome to this bright and spacious 2+ bedroom, 1-bath second-floor apartment in Stamford's sought-after Glenbrook neighborhood. Featuring hardwood floors throughout, this well-maintained home offers a flexible floor plan with two generously sized bedrooms plus a perfect size room for an office for working from home, a nursery, or a hobby room. Enjoy the convenience of utilities included (tenant responsible only for cable and cooking gas), making budgeting simple and stress-free. Ideally located within walking distance of the Glenbrook Metro-North Train Station, this apartment is perfect for commuters seeking easy access to New York City. Conveniently situated near shopping, restaurants, parks, and major roadways, you'll enjoy everything Stamford has to offer right outside your door. On-street parking is available. Don't miss this opportunity to enjoy comfortable living in one of Stamford's most desirable neighborhoods!
